properties.remark: MPING REPORTS OF STREET FLOODING, STREETS CLOSED AND VEHICLES STRANDED.
LARGE TREE LIMBS DOWN AND TIN METAL ROOFING BLOWN OFF OF SAN DIEGO HIGH SCHOOL BUS BARN.
LARGE TREE LIMBS DOWN SOUTH OF ALICE, TX.
FIRE CHIEF COMFIRMS DAMAGE TO FEMA TRAILERS, SOME DESTROYED, AT THE OLD NAVY BASE EAST OF THE BEEVILLE PRISON. THERE WAS DAMAGE TO THE HANGER ROOF AS WELL.

PRELIMINARY EF-0 TORNADO AT CHASE FIELD (PREVIOUSLY KNOWN AS NAS BEEVILLE). APPROXIMATELY 50 RVS DAMAGED, 12 RVS DESTROYED. SEVERAL HANGERS HAD ROOF DAMAGE WITH ASPHALT ROOFING MATERIALS BLOWN OFF. SEVERAL FULL SIZED SINGLE WIDE MOBILE HOMES WERE ALSO BLOWN OVER. WITNESSED BY SECURITY GUARD AT 724 AM CDT.
GUST OF 63 MPH MEASURED AT THE BEEVILLE AIRPORT
METAL RV CANOPY BLOWN OFF AND INTO A NEARBY FIELD AROUND THE INTERSECTION OF COUNTY ROAD 16 & COUNTY ROAD 79.
